lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar sat naam karataa purakh nirbhau niravair akaal moorat ajoonee saibhan gur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. The Name Is Truth. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying, Beyond Birth, Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace ~

lines.gurmukhi: ॥ ਜਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: | jap |
lines.english: Chant And Meditate:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੈ ਭੀ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਹੋਸੀ ਭੀ ਸਚੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hai bhee sach naanak hosee bhee sach |1|
lines.english: True Here And Now. O Nanak, Forever And Ever True. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਸਚੁ ਜੁਗਾਦਿ ਸਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: aad sach jugaad sach |
lines.english: True In The Primal Beginning. True Throughout The Ages.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਚੈ ਸੋਚਿ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਜੇ ਸੋਚੀ ਲਖ ਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sochai soch na hovee je sochee lakh vaar |
lines.english: By thinking, He cannot be reduced to thought, even by thinking hundreds of thousands of times.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੁਖਿਆ ਭੁਖ ਨ ਉਤਰੀ ਜੇ ਬੰਨਾ ਪੁਰੀਆ ਭਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: bhukhiaa bhukh na utaree je banaa pureea bhaar |
lines.english: The hunger of the hungry is not appeased, even by piling up loads of worldly goods.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੁਪੈ ਚੁਪ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਜੇ ਲਾਇ ਰਹਾ ਲਿਵ ਤਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: chupai chup na hovee je laae rahaa liv taar |
lines.english: By remaining silent, inner silence is not obtained, even by remaining lovingly absorbed deep within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਸ ਸਿਆਣਪਾ ਲਖ ਹੋਹਿ ਤ ਇਕ ਨ ਚਲੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: sehas siaanapaa lakh hohi ta ik na chalai naal |
lines.english: Hundreds of thousands of clever tricks, but not even one of them will go along with you in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਵ ਸਚਿਆਰਾ ਹੋਈਐ ਕਿਵ ਕੂੜੈ ਤੁਟੈ ਪਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: kiv sachiaaraa hoeeai kiv koorrai tuttai paal |
lines.english: So how can you become truthful? And how can the veil of illusion be torn away?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮਿ ਰਜਾਈ ਚਲਣਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਨਾਲਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hukam rajaaee chalanaa naanak likhiaa naal |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, it is written that you shall obey the Hukam of His Command, and walk in the Way of His Will. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਹੋਵਨਿ ਆਕਾਰ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਕਹਿਆ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: hukamee hovan aakaar hukam na kahiaa jaaee |
lines.english: By His Command, bodies are created; His Command cannot be described.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਹੋਵਨਿ ਜੀਅ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: hukamee hovan jeea hukam milai vaddiaaee |
lines.english: By His Command, souls come into being; by His Command, glory and greatness are obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਉਤਮੁ ਨੀਚੁ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਦੁਖ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਈਅਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: hukamee utam neech hukam likh dukh sukh paaeeeh |
lines.english: By His Command, some are high and some are low; by His Written Command, pain and pleasure are obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੈ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਹੁਕਮ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: hukamai andar sabh ko baahar hukam na koe |
lines.english: Everyone is subject to His Command; no one is beyond His Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨਾ ਹੁਕਮੀ ਬਖਸੀਸ ਇਕਿ ਹੁਕਮੀ ਸਦਾ ਭਵਾਈਅਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa hukamee bakhasees ik hukamee sadaa bhavaaeeeh |
lines.english: Some, by His Command, are blessed and forgiven; others, by His Command, wander aimlessly forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਤਾਣੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਕਿਸੈ ਤਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: gaavai ko taan hovai kisai taan |
lines.english: Some sing of His Power-who has that Power?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹੁਕਮੈ ਜੇ ਬੁਝੈ ਤ ਹਉਮੈ ਕਹੈ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak hukamai je bujhai ta haumai kahai na koe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, one who understands His Command, does not speak in ego. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਦਾਤਿ ਜਾਣੈ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: gaavai ko daat jaanai neesaan |
lines.english: Some sing of His Gifts, and know His Sign and Insignia.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਗੁਣ ਵਡਿਆਈਆ ਚਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: gaavai ko gun vaddiaaeea chaar |
lines.english: Some sing of His Glorious Virtues, Greatness and Beauty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਵਿਦਿਆ ਵਿਖਮੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gaavai ko vidiaa vikham veechaar |
lines.english: Some sing of knowledge obtained of Him, through difficult philosophical studies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਸਾਜਿ ਕਰੇ ਤਨੁ ਖੇਹ ॥
lines.translit: gaavai ko saaj kare tan kheh |
lines.english: Some sing that He fashions the body, and then again reduces it to dust.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਜੀਅ ਲੈ ਫਿਰਿ ਦੇਹ ॥
lines.translit: gaavai ko jeea lai fir deh |
lines.english: Some sing that He takes life away, and then again restores it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਜਾਪੈ ਦਿਸੈ ਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: gaavai ko jaapai disai door |
lines.english: Some sing that He seems so very far away.
